headline: Cosmetics.lk wins Best E-Commerce Cosmetics Retailer
standfirst: Cosmetics.lk is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best E-Commerce Cosmetics Retailer, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Cosmetics.lk is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best E-Commerce Cosmetics Retailer. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Cosmetics.lk, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Cosmetics.lk is an online beauty and personal-care retailer listing beauty, skincare, haircare, makeup, and related brands/products. The GBE archive records the online beauty store award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
